drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T1(f1 matches "(a|be)", $b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f2)
    T1(f0 == false, $b0_1_0 : f1, $b0_1_1 : f2)
then
    delete($p0_0);
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f1 == true)
then
    insert(new T1(false, $p1_0.getF2(), -1000000007));
    insert(new T1($p1_0.isF3(), "", -1000000007));
end
rule "R2"
no-loop
when
    $p2_0 : T0($b2_0_0 : f3)
then
    insert(new T1(false, $p2_0.getF2(), -1000000007));
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T0($b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f0, f1 == false)
then
    insert(new T1($b3_0_0, "alpha", -1000000007));
    modify($p3_0) { setF1(true), setF2($p3_0.getF2()), setF3(true) }
end
rule "R4"
no-loop
when
    $p4_0 : T1(f1 matches "(a|be)", $b4_0_0 : f2, $b4_0_1 : f2)
    T1(f0 == false, $b4_1_0 : f1, $b4_1_1 : f2)
    exists T1(f0 != false, f2 != 11)
then
    delete($p4_0);
end
rule "R5"
no-loop
when
    T1(f1 matches "(a|be)", $b5_0_0 : f2, $b5_0_1 : f2)
    T1(f0 == false, $b5_1_0 : f1, $b5_1_1 : f2)
    T1($b5_2_0 : f1, $b5_2_1 : f2)
then
end
